title: Hiding Obsidian Canvas Grid Dots
first_prompt: How do I toggle off the background grid dots in Obsidian Canvas?
summary: Irwin was attempting to determine how to hide the background grid dots within Obsidian Canvas. The conversation evolved from troubleshooting non-existent built-in settings to confirming that a CSS snippet was required for the fix. Finally, the discussion shifted to export functionality, where the assistant provided instructions for exporting the Canvas as a PNG image.
